title: cyclosorus bangii
intro: Cyclosorus bangii is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly known as the maiden-hair ferns. Traditionally, Cyclosorus bangii has been used in various folk medicine practices due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus bangii include its potential to alleviate conditions such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. Cyclosorus bangii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves can also be dried and used in traditional remedies.
